info.name: Qeet Pay API
info.description: Qeet Pay REST API (v1) — payments, payouts, billing, GST invoicing, embedded finance and more. Auth: set the {{apiKey}} variable to a qp_live_/qp_test_ key (sent as X-Api-Key). Money is integer minor units (paise).
